case_title: KENNETH SCOTT JR VS. JAMES PELLY

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS - NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE (FOR AUG-10-2022 HEARING DATE) RETURNED. SENT TO: DEFENDANT - VILEN GABRIELYAN; (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-10-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-13-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506.PLAINTIFF KENNETH SCOTT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JAMES PELLY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FRANCO FIEDLER IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT VILEN GABRIELYAN IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE FOR DEFENDANT JAMES PELLY ON FILE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FOR DEFENDANTS FIEDLER AND GABRIELYAN. PLAINTIFF DISMISSES WITHOUT PREJUDICE HIS CASE AGAINST THE UNSERVED DEFENDANTS. THE COURT AMENDS THE CLAIM TO NAME THE CORRECT DEFENDANT TO OSCAR TECHNOLOGIES, INC. AND DISMISSES WITH PREJUDICE THE CASE AGAINST JAMES PELLY AS AN INDIVIDUAL, FRANCO FIEDLER AND VILEN GABRIELYAN. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $1276.03 (INCLUDES COSTS - SERVICE IS CAPPED AT $150) TO THE PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE SEP-13TH HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL SENT BY COURT. REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER TO DISMISS CASE REQUESTED BY JAMES PELLY HAS BEEN DENIED.

SMALL CLAIMS - NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE (FOR AUG-10-2022 HEARING DATE) RETURNED. SENT TO: DEFENDANT - FRANCISCO FIEDLER; (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY SCOTT JR, KENNETH AS TO DEFENDANT OSCAR TECHNOLOGIES, INC. FIEDLER, FRANCISCO GABRIELYAN, VILEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-10-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER (SC-105A)ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER REQUESTED BY JAMES PELLY DENIED -YOU MUST GO TO COURT IF YOU WANT TO BE HEARD; COPY OF ORDER MAILED TO ALL PARTIES
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $450-UNLIMITED ATTEMPTS) SERVED JUL-25-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT OSCAR TECHNOLOGIES, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT OSCAR TECHNOLOGIES, INC.
ORDER TO CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
(SC-105)REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER FILED BY DEFENDANT OSCAR TECHNOLOGIES, INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFF KENNETH SCOTT JR IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT JAMES PELLY IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
